# claude_federation_issuer (Data Source)

Fetches a Workload Identity Federation issuer (`fdis_...`) by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_federation_issuer" "example" {
  id = "fdis_01abc123"
}

output "federation_issuer_name" {
  value = data.claude_federation_issuer.example.name
}

output "federation_issuer_url" {
  value = data.claude_federation_issuer.example.issuer_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Identifier of the federation issuer (`fdis_...`).

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was archived, if archived.
- `check_jti` (Boolean) Whether the jwt-bearer exchange enforces JTI single-use (replay protection).
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was created.
- `issuer_url` (String) The `iss` claim value incoming JWTs must match exactly.
- `jwks_ca_cert_pem` (String) Optional custom CA (PEM) for TLS verification of the JWKS fetch.
- `jwks_discovery_base` (String) Discovery base URL, set when it differs from `issuer_url`.
- `jwks_inline_keys` (String) A JSON array of JWK objects, set when `jwks_type` is `inline`.
- `jwks_type` (String) How signing keys are obtained: `discovery`, `explicit_url`, or `inline`.
- `jwks_url` (String) JWKS endpoint URL, set when `jwks_type` is `explicit_url`.
- `max_jwt_lifetime_seconds` (Number) Maximum allowed iat→exp spread for assertions from this issuer.
- `name` (String) Slug identifier of the federation issuer.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `federation_issuer`.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was last updated.
